verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem cum perfecisset Salomon ædificium domus Domini, et ædificium regis, et omne quod optaverat et voluerat facere,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כְּכַלּ֣וֹת שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה לִבְנ֥וֹת אֶת־בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְאֶת־בֵּ֣ית הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־חֵ֣שֶׁק שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָפֵ֖ץ לַעֲשֽׂוֹת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass when Solomon had finished the building of the house of the Lord, and the king's house, and all that he desired and was pleased to do,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Salomo oli rakentanut Herran huoneen ja kuninkaan huoneen, ja kaikki mitä hänen sydämensä anoi ja halusi tehdäksensä,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when Solomon had finished the building of the house of the Lord, and the king’s house, and all Solomon’s desire which he was pleased to do,

verses.latin_vulgate: apparuit ei Dominus secundo, sicut apparuerat ei in Gabaon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרָ֧א יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶל־שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה שֵׁנִ֑ית כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר נִרְאָ֥ה אֵלָ֖יו בְּגִבְעֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: That the Lord appeared to him the second time, as he had appeared to him in Gabaon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ilmaantui Herra Salomolle toisen kerran, niinkuin hän oli hänelle ilmaantunut Gibeonissa.
verses.king_james: That the Lord appeared to Solomon the second time, as he had appeared unto him at Gibeon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad eum : Exaudivi orationem tuam et deprecationem tuam, quam deprecatus es coram me : sanctificavi domum hanc quam ædificasti, ut ponerem nomen meum ibi in sempiternum, et erunt oculi mei et cor meum ibi cunctis diebus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלָ֗יו שָׁ֠מַ֠עְתִּי אֶת־תְּפִלָּתְךָ֣ וְאֶת־תְּחִנָּתְךָ֮ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִתְחַנַּ֣נְתָּה לְפָנַי֒ הִקְדַּ֗שְׁתִּי אֶת־הַבַּ֤יִת הַזֶּה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּנִ֔תָה לָשׂוּם־שְׁמִ֥י שָׁ֖ם עַד־עוֹלָ֑ם וְהָי֨וּ עֵינַ֧י וְלִבִּ֛י שָׁ֖ם כׇּל־הַיָּמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to him: I have heard thy prayer and thy supplication, which thou hast made before me: I have sanctified this house, which thou hast built, to put my name there for ever; and my eyes, and my heart, shall be there always.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi hänelle: Minä olen kuullut sinun rukoukses ja anomises, joita olet minun edessäni anonut, ja olen pyhittänyt tämän huoneen, jonkas rakentanut olet, pannakseni siihen minun nimeni ijankaikkisesti, ja minun silmäni ja sydämeni ovat alati siinä.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto him, I have heard thy prayer and thy supplication, that thou hast made before me: I have hallowed this house, which thou hast built, to put my name there for ever; and mine eyes and mine heart shall be there perpetually.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu quoque si ambulaveris coram me sicut ambulavit pater tuus, in simplicitate cordis et in æquitate, et feceris omnia quæ præcepi tibi, et legitima mea et judicia mea servaveris,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֞ה אִם־תֵּלֵ֣ךְ לְפָנַ֗י כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר הָלַ֜ךְ דָּוִ֤ד אָבִ֙יךָ֙ בְּתׇם־לֵבָ֣ב וּבְיֹ֔שֶׁר לַעֲשׂ֕וֹת כְּכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוִּיתִ֑יךָ חֻקַּ֥י וּמִשְׁפָּטַ֖י תִּשְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if thou wilt walk before me, as thy father walked, in simplicity of heart, and in uprightness: and wilt do all that I have commanded thee, and wilt keep my ordinances, and my judgments,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jos sinä vallat minun edessäni, niinkuin sinun isäs David vaeltanut on, sydämen yksinkertaisuudessa ja vakuudessa, niin ettäs teet kaikki, mitä minä sinulle käskenyt olen, ja pidät minun säätyni ja oikeuteni;
verses.king_james: And if thou wilt walk before me, as David thy father walked, in integrity of heart, and in uprightness, to do according to all that I have commanded thee, and wilt keep my statutes and my judgments:

verses.latin_vulgate: ponam thronum regni tui super Israël in sempiternum, sicut locutus sum David patri tuo, dicens : Non auferetur vir de genere tuo de solio Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲקִ֨מֹתִ֜י אֶת־כִּסֵּ֧א מַֽמְלַכְתְּךָ֛ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְעֹלָ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבַּ֗רְתִּי עַל־דָּוִ֤ד אָבִ֙יךָ֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר לֹֽא־יִכָּרֵ֤ת לְךָ֙ אִ֔ישׁ מֵעַ֖ל כִּסֵּ֥א יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will establish the throne of thy kingdom over Israel for ever, as I promised David, thy father, saying: There shall not fail a man of thy race upon the throne of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä vahvistan sinun valtakuntas istuimen Israelin ylitse ijankaikkisesti, niinkuin minä sinun isäs Davidin kanssa puhunut olen, sanoen: ei sinulta pidä otettaman pois mies Israelin istuimelta.
verses.king_james: Then I will establish the throne of thy kingdom upon Israel for ever, as I promised to David thy father, saying, There shall not fail thee a man upon the throne of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si autem aversione aversi fueritis vos et filii vestri, non sequentes me, nec custodientes mandata mea et cæremonias meas quas proposui vobis, sed abieritis et colueritis deos alienos, et adoraveritis eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־שׁ֨וֹב תְּשֻׁב֜וּן אַתֶּ֤ם וּבְנֵיכֶם֙ מֵֽאַחֲרַ֔י וְלֹ֤א תִשְׁמְרוּ֙ מִצְוֺתַ֣י חֻקֹּתַ֔י אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לִפְנֵיכֶ֑ם וַהֲלַכְתֶּ֗ם וַֽעֲבַדְתֶּם֙ אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֲחֵרִ֔ים וְהִשְׁתַּחֲוִיתֶ֖ם לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if you and your children, revolting, shall turn away from following me, and will not keep my commandments, and my ceremonies, which I have set before you, but will go and worship strange gods, and adore them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jos te käännätte teitänne peräti pois minusta, te ja teidän lapsenne, ja ette pidä minun käskyjäni ja säätyjäni, jotka minä olen pannut teidän eteenne, ja menette ja palvelette vieraita jumalia ja rukoilette niitä;
verses.king_james: But if ye shall at all turn from following me, ye or your children, and will not keep my commandments and my statutes which I have set before you, but go and serve other gods, and worship them:

verses.latin_vulgate: auferam Israël de superficie terræ quam dedi eis, et templum quod sanctificavi nomini meo, projiciam a conspectu meo : eritque Israël in proverbium, et in fabulam cunctis populis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכְרַתִּ֣י אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל מֵעַ֨ל פְּנֵ֤י הָאֲדָמָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָתַ֣תִּי לָהֶ֔ם וְאֶת־הַבַּ֙יִת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִקְדַּ֣שְׁתִּי לִשְׁמִ֔י אֲשַׁלַּ֖ח מֵעַ֣ל פָּנָ֑י וְהָיָ֧ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל לְמָשָׁ֥ל וְלִשְׁנִינָ֖ה בְּכׇל־הָעַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will take away Israel from the face of the land which I have given them; and the temple which I have sanctified to my name, I will cast out of my sight; and Israel shall be a proverb, and a byword among all people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä hävitän Israelin siitä maasta, jonka minä heille antanut olen: ja huoneen, jonka minä nimelleni pyhittänyt olen, heitän minä minun kasvoni edestä pois. Ja Israel pitää oleman sananlaskuksi ja jutuksi kaikissa kansoissa.
verses.king_james: Then will I cut off Israel out of the land which I have given them; and this house, which I have hallowed for my name, will I cast out of my sight; and Israel shall be a proverb and a byword among all people:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et domus hæc erit in exemplum : omnis qui transierit per eam, stupebit, et sibilabit, et dicet : Quare fecit Dominus sic terræ huic, et domui huic ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַבַּ֤יִת הַזֶּה֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה עֶלְי֔וֹן כׇּל־עֹבֵ֥ר עָלָ֖יו יִשֹּׁ֣ם וְשָׁרָ֑ק וְאָמְר֗וּ עַל־מֶ֨ה עָשָׂ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ כָּ֔כָה לָאָ֥רֶץ הַזֹּ֖את וְלַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this house shall be made an example of: every one that shall pass by it, shall be astonished, and shall hiss, and say: Why hath the Lord done thus to this land, and to this house?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vaikka tämä huone on kaikkein korkein, niin kuitenkin kaikkein, jotka siitä käyvät ohitse, pitää hämmästymän ja viheltämän, sanoen: miksi Herra näin teki tälle maalle ja tälle huoneelle?
verses.king_james: And at this house, which is high, every one that passeth by it shall be astonished, and shall hiss; and they shall say, Why hath the Lord done thus unto this land, and to this house?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondebunt : Quia dereliquerunt Dominum Deum suum, qui eduxit patres eorum de terra Ægypti, et secuti sunt deos alienos, et adoraverunt eos, et coluerunt eos : idcirco induxit Dominus super eos omne malum hoc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמְר֗וּ עַל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר עָזְב֜וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר הוֹצִ֣יא אֶת־אֲבֹתָם֮ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֒יִם֒ וַֽיַּחֲזִ֙קוּ֙ בֵּאלֹהִ֣ים אֲחֵרִ֔ים (וישתחו) [וַיִּשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ] לָהֶ֖ם וַיַּעַבְדֻ֑ם עַל־כֵּ֗ן הֵבִ֤יא יְהֹוָה֙ עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הָרָעָ֖ה הַזֹּֽאת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall answer: Because they forsook the Lord their God, who brought their fathers out of the land of Egypt, and followed strange gods, and adored them, and worshipped them: therefore hath the Lord brought upon them all this evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin vastataan: että he Herran Jumalansa hylkäsivät, joka heidän isänsä Egyptin maalta johdatti ulos, ja seurasivat muita jumalia ja kumarsivat niitä ja palvelivat niitä; sentähden on Herra kaiken tämän pahan antanut tulla heidän päällensä.
verses.king_james: And they shall answer, Because they forsook the Lord their God, who brought forth their fathers out of the land of Egypt, and have taken hold upon other gods, and have worshipped them, and served them: therefore hath the Lord brought upon them all this evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Expletis autem annis viginti postquam ædificaverat Salomon duas domos, id est, domum Domini, et domum regis
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י מִקְצֵה֙ עֶשְׂרִ֣ים שָׁנָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־בָּנָ֥ה שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה אֶת־שְׁנֵ֣י הַבָּתִּ֑ים אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when twenty years were ended, after Solomon had built the two houses; that is, the house of the Lord, and the house of the king,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kaksikymmentä ajastaikaa kulunut oli, joina Salomo ne kaksi huonetta rakensi, Herran huoneen ja kuninkaan huoneen,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass at the end of twenty years, when Solomon had built the two houses, the house of the Lord, and the king’s house,

verses.latin_vulgate: (Hiram rege Tyri præbente Salomoni ligna cedrina et abiegna, et aurum juxta omne quod opus habuerat), tunc dedit Salomon Hiram viginti oppida in terra Galilææ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִירָ֣ם מֶֽלֶךְ־צֹ֠ר נִשָּׂ֨א אֶת־שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה בַּעֲצֵי֩ אֲרָזִ֨ים וּבַעֲצֵ֧י בְרוֹשִׁ֛ים וּבַזָּהָ֖ב לְכׇל־חֶפְצ֑וֹ אָ֡ז יִתֵּן֩ הַמֶּ֨לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֤ה לְחִירָם֙ עֶשְׂרִ֣ים עִ֔יר בְּאֶ֖רֶץ הַגָּלִֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: (Hiram, the king of Tyre, furnishing Solomon with cedar trees, and fir trees, and gold, according to all he had need of) then Solomon gave Hiram twenty cities in the land of Galilee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joihin Hiram Tyron kuningas antoi Salomolle sedripuita, honkia ja kultaa, kaiken hänen tahtonsa jälkeen; niin kuningas Salomo antoi Hiramille kaksikymmentä kaupunkia Galilean maassa.
verses.king_james: (Now Hiram the king of Tyre had furnished Solomon with cedar trees and fir trees, and with gold, according to all his desire,) that then king Solomon gave Hiram twenty cities in the land of Galilee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et egressus est Hiram de Tyro ut videret oppida quæ dederat ei Salomon, et non placuerunt ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֤א חִירָם֙ מִצֹּ֔ר לִרְאוֹת֙ אֶת־הֶ֣עָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַן־ל֖וֹ שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה וְלֹ֥א יָשְׁר֖וּ בְּעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hiram came out of Tyre, to see the towns which Solomon had given him, and they pleased him not;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hiram matkusti Tyrosta katsomaan kaupungeita, jotka Salomo hänelle antanut oli; ja ei ne hänelle kelvanneet.
verses.king_james: And Hiram came out from Tyre to see the cities which Solomon had given him; and they pleased him not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait : Hæccine sunt civitates quas dedisti mihi, frater ? Et appellavit eas terram Chabul, usque in diem hanc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֕אמֶר מָ֚ה הֶעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥תָּה לִּ֖י אָחִ֑י וַיִּקְרָ֤א לָהֶם֙ אֶ֣רֶץ כָּב֔וּל עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Are these the cities which thou hast given me, brother? And he called them the land of Chabul, unto this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: mitkä nämä kaupungit ovat, minun veljeni, jotkas minulle antanut olet? Ja hän kutsui ne Kabulin maaksi tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And he said, What cities are these which thou hast given me, my brother? And he called them the land of Cabul unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit quoque Hiram ad regem Salomonem centum viginti talenta auri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֥ח חִירָ֖ם לַמֶּ֑לֶךְ מֵאָ֥ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים כִּכַּ֥ר זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hiram sent to king Solomon a hundred and twenty talents of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hiram oli lähettänyt kuninkaalle sata ja kaksikymmentä sentneriä kultaa.
verses.king_james: And Hiram sent to the king sixscore talents of gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est summa expensarum quam obtulit rex Salomon ad ædificandam domum Domini et domum suam, et Mello, et murum Jerusalem, et Heser, et Mageddo, et Gazer.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֶ֨ה דְבַר־הַמַּ֜ס אֲשֶֽׁר־הֶעֱלָ֣ה ׀ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֗ה לִבְנוֹת֩ אֶת־בֵּ֨ית יְהֹוָ֤ה וְאֶת־בֵּיתוֹ֙ וְאֶת־הַמִּלּ֔וֹא וְאֵ֖ת חוֹמַ֣ת יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְאֶת־חָצֹ֥ר וְאֶת־מְגִדּ֖וֹ וְאֶת־גָּֽזֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the sum of the expenses, which king Solomon offered to build the house of the Lord, and his own house, and Mello, and the wall of Jerusalem, and Heser, and Mageddo, and Gazer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämä on luku verosta, jonka kuningas Salomo kantoi rakentaaksensa Herran huonetta, ja omaa huonettansa, ja Milloa, ja Jerusalemin muuria, ja Hatsoria, ja Megiddoa ja Gaseria.
verses.king_james: And this is the reason of the levy which king Solomon raised; for to build the house of the Lord, and his own house, and Millo, and the wall of Jerusalem, and Hazor, and Megiddo, and Gezer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pharao rex Ægypti ascendit, et cepit Gazar, succenditque eam igni, et Chananæum, qui habitabat in civitate, interfecit : et dedit eam in dotem filiæ suæ uxori Salomonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פַּרְעֹ֨ה מֶלֶךְ־מִצְרַ֜יִם עָלָ֗ה וַיִּלְכֹּ֤ד אֶת־גֶּ֙זֶר֙ וַיִּשְׂרְפָ֣הּ בָּאֵ֔שׁ וְאֶת־הַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֛י הַיֹּשֵׁ֥ב בָּעִ֖יר הָרָ֑ג וַֽיִּתְּנָהּ֙ שִׁלֻּחִ֔ים לְבִתּ֖וֹ אֵ֥שֶׁת שְׁלֹמֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Pharao, the king of Egypt, came up and took Gazer, and burnt it with fire: and slew the Chanaanite that dwelt in the city, and gave it for a dowry to his daughter, Solomon's wife.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Pharao Egyptin kuningas oli mennyt ja voittanut Gaserin, ja polttanut sen tulella, ja lyönyt Kanaanealaiset kuoliaaksi, jotka kaupungissa asuivat, ja oli antanut sen tyttärellensä Salomon emännälle lahjaksi.
verses.king_james: For Pharaoh king of Egypt had gone up, and taken Gezer, and burnt it with fire, and slain the Canaanites that dwelt in the city, and given it for a present unto his daughter, Solomon’s wife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificavit ergo Salomon Gazer, et Bethoron inferiorem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֤בֶן שְׁלֹמֹה֙ אֶת־גָּ֔זֶר וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית חֹרֹ֖ן תַּחְתּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Solomon built Gazer, and Bethhoron the nether,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Salomo rakensi Gaserin ja alamaisen BetHoronin,
verses.king_james: And Solomon built Gezer, and Beth–horon the nether,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Balaath, et Palmiram in terra solitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶֽת־בַּעֲלָ֛ת וְאֶת־[תַּדְמֹ֥ר] (תמר) בַּמִּדְבָּ֖ר בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Baalath, and Palmira, in the land of the wilderness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Baalatin ja Tadmorin, korvessa maalla,
verses.king_james: And Baalath, and Tadmor in the wilderness, in the land,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnes vicos qui ad se pertinebant et erant absque muro, munivit, et civitates curruum et civitates equitum, et quodcumque ei placuit ut ædificaret in Jerusalem, et in Libano, et in omni terra potestatis suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֨ת כׇּל־עָרֵ֤י הַֽמִּסְכְּנוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָי֣וּ לִשְׁלֹמֹ֔ה וְאֵת֙ עָרֵ֣י הָרֶ֔כֶב וְאֵ֖ת עָרֵ֣י הַפָּרָשִׁ֑ים וְאֵ֣ת ׀ חֵ֣שֶׁק שְׁלֹמֹ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר חָשַׁק֙ לִבְנ֤וֹת בִּירוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ וּבַלְּבָנ֔וֹן וּבְכֹ֖ל אֶ֥רֶץ מֶמְשַׁלְתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the towns that belonged to himself, and were not walled, he fortified; the cities also of the chariots, and the cities of the horsemen, and whatsoever he had a mind to build in Jerusalem, and in Libanus, and in all the land of his dominion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki tavarakaupungit, jotka Salomolla olivat, ja kaikki vaunukaupungit, ja ratsasmiesten kaupungit, ja mitä Salomo halusi ja tahtoi rakentaa Jerusalemissa ja Libanonissa, ja koko maassa, joka hänen vallassansa oli.
verses.king_james: And all the cities of store that Solomon had, and cities for his chariots, and cities for his horsemen, and that which Solomon desired to build in Jerusalem, and in Lebanon, and in all the land of his dominion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Universum populum qui remanserat de Amorrhæis, et Hethæis, et Pherezæis, et Hevæis, et Jebusæis, qui non sunt de filiis Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הָ֠עָ֠ם הַנּוֹתָ֨ר מִן־הָאֱמֹרִ֜י הַחִתִּ֤י הַפְּרִזִּי֙ הַחִוִּ֣י וְהַיְבוּסִ֔י אֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹא־מִבְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the people that were left of the Amorrhites, and Hethites, and Pherezites, and Hevites, and Jebusites, that are not of the children of Israel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaiken jääneen kansan Amorealaisista, Hetiläisistä, Pheresiläisistä, Heviläisistä ja Jebusilaisista, jotka ei olleet Israelin lapsia:
verses.king_james: And all the people that were left of the Amorites, Hittites, Perizzites, Hivites, and Jebusites, which were not of the children of Israel,

verses.latin_vulgate: horum filios qui remanserant in terra, quos scilicet non potuerant filii Israël exterminare, fecit Salomon tributarios usque in diem hanc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵיהֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר נֹתְר֤וּ אַֽחֲרֵיהֶם֙ בָּאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־יָכְל֛וּ בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְהַחֲרִימָ֑ם וַיַּעֲלֵ֤ם שְׁלֹמֹה֙ לְמַס־עֹבֵ֔ד עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their children, that were left in the land; to wit, such as the children of Israel had not been able to destroy, Solomon made tributary unto this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän lapsensa, jotka he jättivät heistänsä maahan, joita Israelin lapset ei taitaneet hävittää; ne teki Salomo verolliseksi tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: Their children that were left after them in the land, whom the children of Israel also were not able utterly to destroy, upon those did Solomon levy a tribute of bondservice unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis autem Israël non constituit Salomon servire quemquam, sed erant viri bellatores, et ministri ejus, et principes, et duces, et præfecti curruum et equorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵי֙ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לֹא־נָתַ֥ן שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה עָ֑בֶד כִּי־הֵ֞ם אַנְשֵׁ֣י הַמִּלְחָמָ֗ה וַֽעֲבָדָיו֙ וְשָׂרָ֣יו וְשָׁלִישָׁ֔יו וְשָׂרֵ֥י רִכְבּ֖וֹ וּפָרָשָֽׁיו׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: But of the children of Israel, Solomon made not any to be bondmen, but they were warriors, and his servants, and his princes, and captains, and overseers of the chariots and horses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Israelin lapsista ei Salomo tehnyt yhtään orjaksi; vaan ne olivat sotamiehet, ja hänen palveliansa, ja päämiehensä, ja esimiehensä, ja hänen vaunuinsa ja ratsasmiestensä päämiehet.
verses.king_james: But of the children of Israel did Solomon make no bondmen: but they were men of war, and his servants, and his princes, and his captains, and rulers of his chariots, and his horsemen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erant autem principes super omnia opera Salomonis præpositi quingenti quinquaginta, qui habebant subjectum populum, et statutis operibus imperabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה ׀ שָׂרֵ֣י הַנִּצָּבִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר עַל־הַמְּלָאכָה֙ לִשְׁלֹמֹ֔ה חֲמִשִּׁ֖ים וַחֲמֵ֣שׁ מֵא֑וֹת הָרֹדִ֣ים בָּעָ֔ם הָעֹשִׂ֖ים בַּמְּלָאכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were five hundred and fifty chief officers set over all the works of Solomon, and they had people under them, and had charge over the appointed works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja virkamiesten päämiehiä, jotka olivat Salomon työn päällä, oli viisisataa ja viisikymmentä, jotka kansaa hallitsivat ja työn toimittivat.
verses.king_james: These were the chief of the officers that were over Solomon’s work, five hundred and fifty, which bare rule over the people that wrought in the work.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filia autem Pharaonis ascendit de civitate David in domum suam, quam ædificaverat ei Salomon : tunc ædificavit Mello.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ בַּת־פַּרְעֹ֗ה עָֽלְתָה֙ מֵעִ֣יר דָּוִ֔ד אֶל־בֵּיתָ֖הּ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּֽנָה־לָ֑הּ אָ֖ז בָּנָ֥ה אֶת־הַמִּלּֽוֹא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the daughter of Pharao came up out of the city of David to her house, which Solomon had built for her: then did he build Mello.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Pharaon tytär meni ylös Davidin kaupungista omaan huoneesensa, jonka (Salomo) hänelle rakentanut oli. Silloin rakensi hän myös Millon.
verses.king_james: But Pharaoh’s daughter came up out of the city of David unto her house which Solomon had built for her: then did he build Millo.

verses.latin_vulgate: Offerebat quoque Salomon, tribus vicibus per annos singulos, holocausta et pacificas victimas super altare quod ædificaverat Domino, et adolebat thymiama coram Domino : perfectumque est templum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶעֱלָ֣ה שְׁלֹמֹ֡ה שָׁלֹשׁ֩ פְּעָמִ֨ים בַּשָּׁנָ֜ה עֹל֣וֹת וּשְׁלָמִ֗ים עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֙חַ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּנָ֣ה לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה וְהַקְטֵ֣יר אִתּ֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֖ר לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְשִׁלַּ֖ם אֶת־הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Solomon also offered three times every year holocausts, and victims of peace offerings, upon the altar which he had built to the Lord, and he burnt incense before the Lord: and the temple was finished.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo uhrasi kolmasti vuodessa polttouhria ja kiitosuhria alttarilla, jonka hän Herralle rakentanut oli, ja suitsutti sen päällä Herran edessä; ja niin huone päätettiin.
verses.king_james: And three times in a year did Solomon offer burnt offerings and peace offerings upon the altar which he built unto the Lord, and he burnt incense upon the altar that was before the Lord. So he finished the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Classem quoque fecit rex Salomon in Asiongaber, quæ est juxta Ailath in littore maris Rubri, in terra Idumææ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וׇאֳנִ֡י עָשָׂה֩ הַמֶּ֨לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה בְּעֶצְיֽוֹן־גֶּ֨בֶר אֲשֶׁ֧ר אֶת־אֵל֛וֹת עַל־שְׂפַ֥ת יַם־ס֖וּף בְּאֶ֥רֶץ אֱדֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Solomon made a fleet in Asiongaber, which is by Ailath, on the shore of the Red Sea, in the land of Edom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas Salomo teki myös laivan EtseonGeberissä, joka liki Elotia on, Punaisen meren reunan tykönä Edomilaisten maalla.
verses.king_james: And king Solomon made a navy of ships in Ezion–geber, which is beside Eloth, on the shore of the Red sea, in the land of Edom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misitque Hiram in classe illa servos suos viros nauticos et gnaros maris, cum servis Salomonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֨ח חִירָ֤ם בׇּֽאֳנִי֙ אֶת־עֲבָדָ֔יו אַנְשֵׁ֣י אֳנִיּ֔וֹת יֹדְעֵ֖י הַיָּ֑ם עִ֖ם עַבְדֵ֥י שְׁלֹמֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hiram sent his servants in the fleet, sailors that had knowledge of the sea, with the servants of Solomon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hiram lähetti palveliansa laivaan, jotka olivat jalot haaksimiehet ja mereen hyvin harjaantuneet, Salomon palveliain kanssa;
verses.king_james: And Hiram sent in the navy his servants, shipmen that had knowledge of the sea, with the servants of Solomon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui cum venissent in Ophir, sumptum inde aurum quadringentorum viginti talentorum, detulerunt ad regem Salomonem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ אוֹפִ֔ירָה וַיִּקְח֤וּ מִשָּׁם֙ זָהָ֔ב אַרְבַּע־מֵא֥וֹת וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים כִּכָּ֑ר וַיָּבִ֖אוּ אֶל־הַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they came to Ophir; and they brought from thence to king Solomon four hundred and twenty talents of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he tulivat Ophiriin ja veivät sieltä neljäsataa ja kaksikymmentä leiviskää kultaa; ja he veivät sen kuningas Salomolle.
verses.king_james: And they came to Ophir, and fetched from thence gold, four hundred and twenty talents, and brought it to king Solomon.
